idea: Flappy Bird clone with a spaceship dodging asteroids
gameplay_mechanic: Tap to thrust upward, release to fall with gravity (classic Flappy Bird mechanic). Spaceship navigates through gaps between asteroid obstacles scrolling from right to left.
visual_theme: Cute Sci-fi Cartoon — vibrant colors, playful spaceship design, colorful asteroids, starfield background
cta_trigger_condition: Timer-based: CTA End Screen appears after 15 seconds of gameplay regardless of win/lose state
